objective: Advance AO Foundry to production-readiness 100% while preserving AO Forge as the governed execution boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Foundry has durable GoalRun-style loop records
Foundry delegates governed implementation runs to AO Forge
stop_conditions: production readiness is 100/100 with passing tests, clean public-safety scan, and no blocking next actions
a requested action would mutate sibling repositories
next_task: Stop autonomous production-readiness advancement and wait for explicit operator-directed release or live-execution work.
continuation_prompt: Run foundry goal readiness and competitive readiness first. If both are ready with no blocking next actions, emit stop and do not invent another implementation slice; otherwise implement only the highest-value blocking production-readiness SDD slice without replacing AO Forge.
next_action_guard: Stop when goal readiness reaches 100 with no blocking next actions. Only delegate implementation through AO Forge when readiness is below 100 or blocking evidence exists.
